repositories.name: advanced-ts
repositories.description: Focused on advanced TypeScript techniques: mapped/conditional/infer/template literal types, type system performance, deep dive utility types, React strict typing, and production patterns.

repositories.name: type-challenges
repositories.description: Hundreds of advanced TypeScript typing challenges to master the type system. Learn to create powerful utility types, mapped/conditional/distributed types.

repositories.name: design-patterns-typescript
repositories.description: Classic design patterns (creational, structural, behavioral) coded in idiomatic TypeScript with clear implementations and explanations.

repositories.name: Learn-Typescript
repositories.description: Hands-on guide covering core types, advanced patterns, React, and Node.js with practical exercises and progressive difficulty.

repositories.name: typescript-book
repositories.description: Concise, open-source TypeScript guide covering effective advanced usage patterns and real-world best practices in production.

repositories.name: developer-roadmap
repositories.description: Detailed TypeScript learning roadmap with links to advanced topics, design patterns, and ecosystem libraries.

repositories.name: Python
repositories.description: Comprehensive algorithms and data structures repository. Hundreds of well-organized, readable implementations including searching, sorting, dynamic programming, and graphs.

repositories.name: data-structures-and-algorithms-in-python
repositories.description: Clear code and explanations for data structures and algorithms from basics to advanced topics like trees, graphs, and dynamic programming.

repositories.name: Strivers-A2Z-DSA-Sheet
repositories.description: Based on Striver's famous DSA roadmap. Huge collection of questions, patterns, and explanations in Python for beginner to advanced levels.

repositories.name: Data-Structure-and-Algorithms
repositories.description: Well-documented data structures, algorithms, and solutions to popular DSA problems from CodeChef and Love Babbar DSA sheets.

repositories.name: project-based-learning
repositories.description: Curated list of project-based tutorials using advanced algorithms and data structures in real-world applications.
repositories.best_for: Applying DSA knowledge to real projects

repositories.name: tensorflow
repositories.description: Official TensorFlow repository with comprehensive tutorials, models, and the full TensorFlow ecosystem for deep learning.
repositories.best_for: Advanced deep learning and production deployment

repositories.name: pytorch
repositories.description: Leading deep learning research framework with excellent documentation and sample code for custom model development.
repositories.best_for: Advanced deep learning research and custom models

repositories.name: transformers
repositories.description: State-of-the-art models for NLP and beyond. Provides pre-trained models, fine-tuning capabilities, and extensive documentation.

repositories.name: fastai
repositories.description: High-level deep learning library on top of PyTorch. Excellent for building advanced models with minimal code.

repositories.name: scikit-learn
repositories.description: Robust machine learning library in Python. Good for transitioning from classical ML to deeper models with production-quality code.
repositories.best_for: Classical ML and scikit-learn best practices

repositories.name: spinningup
repositories.description: OpenAI's educational resource for deep reinforcement learning, including theory and practical coding exercises.

repositories.name: annotated_deep_learning_paper_implementations
repositories.description: Code implementations of cutting-edge deep learning research papers with detailed annotations for understanding.

repositories.name: homemade-machine-learning
repositories.description: Build ML algorithms from scratch to deepen understanding of how they work internally.

repositories.name: awesome-machine-learning
repositories.description: Curated list of ML libraries, frameworks, tools, and resources categorized by language and application.
repositories.best_for: ML stack selection and ecosystem overview

repositories.name: awesome-deep-learning
repositories.description: Comprehensive collection of deep learning frameworks, tutorials, books, and cutting-edge research.
